title: calamagrostis decipiens
intro: Calamagrostis decipiens, also known as False Silver Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Calamagrostis decipiens include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and sprains. Herbal preparations of Calamagrostis decipiens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use.
